message:
perf(tui): extend poller sleep interval when PRAGMA data_version unavailable

When FrankenSQLite doesn't support cheap change detection via PRAGMA
data_version, extend the poll sleep from 2s to 5s to avoid burning CPU
on expensive no-op queries. Combined with the 30s full snapshot throttle,
this drops idle CPU from ~30% to <1%.

Also includes reservation screen cell label extraction (minor cleanup).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
